# Full-line comment at the top of the file.
## Double-hash comment, still one comment.
#comment with no space after the hash
User-agent: commentbot # trailing comment after the agent token
# A comment-only line between the group start and its rules.
Disallow: /a # trailing comment after a rule value
Allow: /a/b#hash-immediately-after-value-starts-a-comment
Disallow: /c#
#
Allow: /d	# comment preceded by a tab
   # indented comment-only line

# Comment before a second group.
User-agent: otherbot#comment-touching-the-agent-token
Disallow: /e
# Final comment line, no trailing newline issues here.
